---
title: "Ancient Oceans"
description: "4.5 billion years of Earth's ocean history"
---

```{=html}
<div id="hero">
  <canvas id="hc"></canvas>
  <div class="hcontent">
    <p class="eyebrow">A journey through deep time</p>
    <h1 class="htitle">Ancient Oceans</h1>
    <p class="hsub">4.5 billion years of Earth's ocean history — from the first seas of a molten world to the reefs that face an uncertain future.</p>
    <p class="hauthors">By Lewis A. Jones &amp; Stephen Pates</p>
  </div>
  <div class="scue" id="scue"><span>Scroll to begin</span><div class="sarr"></div></div>
</div>

<div id="tlc">
  <aside id="gsb" aria-label="Geological timescale">
    <div class="sbh">Timescale</div>
    <div id="gtd"></div>
    <div class="sbf">
      <span class="mv" id="sbmv">4500</span>
      <span class="ml" id="sbml">Ma ago</span>
    </div>
  </aside>
  <main id="evcol" role="main" aria-label="Ocean events through geological time"></main>
  <nav id="evnav" aria-label="Navigate between events">
    <button class="nb" id="nprev" disabled aria-label="Previous event">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="18 15 12 9 6 15"/></svg>
    </button>
    <span class="nct" id="nct">1/—</span>
    <button class="nb" id="nnext" aria-label="Next event">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>
    </button>
  </nav>
</div>

<div id="tdl" class="hid" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="dlc"></div>
  <div class="dli"></div>
  <div class="dlc"></div>
</div>

<div id="ftw" class="hid" role="status" aria-live="polite">
  <div class="tpill">
    <span class="tv" id="ftv">4,500</span>
    <span class="tu" id="ftu">Ma ago</span>
  </div>
  <span class="tpn" id="ftpn">Hadean</span>
</div>

<script src="js/timescale.js"></script>
<script src="js/events.js"></script>
<script src="js/main.js"></script>
```
